title: Study warns of the dangers of overly agreeable AI chatbots
description: Artificial intelligence chatbots are so prone to flattering and validating their human users that they are giving bad advice.

title: America 250: From quill pens to AI, how the US records its history
description: How the U.S. government went from quill pens and typewriters to computers, cloud systems and artificial intelligence to preserve America’s history.
content:
For more than two and a half centuries, America’s story has been recorded on paper.
In 1776, quill and ink were used to tell that story. Typewriters would not enter the federal government until more than a century later.
